tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Run-Around by Blues Traveler (words and music by J. Popper)


(bass slide)  rhythm pattern - play ad infinitum
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
              q   e e e e e e e e e q   e e e[/tab]
[tab]e||-------||--3---3-0-0-0-0-0-0-0-0-2---2-2h3--||
B||-------||--3---3-0-1-1-1-1-1-1-1-3---3-3----||
G||-------||.-0---0-0-0-0-0-2-2-2-2-2---2-2---.||
D||-------||.-0---0-0-2-2-2-2-2-2-2-0---0-0---.||
A||-------||--2---2-0-3-3-3-0-0-0-0-0---0-0----||
E||-15\3--||--3---3-x-x-x-x-x-x-x-x-x---x-x----||[/tab]


[Intro]
[ch]G[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  x6

[Verse 1]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
Oh, once upon a midnight dearie[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
I woke with something in my head[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
You see I couldn't escape the memory[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
Of the phone call and of what you said[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
Like a game show contestant with a parting gift[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
I could not believe my eyes[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
When I saw through the voice of a trusted friend[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
Who needs to humor me and tell me lies,[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
yeah humor me and tell me lies[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
And I'll lie too and say I don't mind[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
And as we seek so shall we find[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
And when you're feeling open I'll still be here[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
But not without a certain degree of fear[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
Of what will be with you and me[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
I still can see things hopefully[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]
But you[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
Why you wanna give me a run-around?[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
Is it a sure-fire way to speed things up?[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
When all it does is slow me down[/tab]

[Verse 3]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
And shake me and my confidence[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
About a great many things[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
But I've been there I can see it cower[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
Like a nervous magician waiting in the wings[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
Of a bad play where the heroes are right[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
And nobody thinks or expects too much[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
And Hollywood's calling for the movie rights[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
Singing "Hey babe, let's keep in touch",[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
hey baby, let's keep in touch[/tab]

[Verse 4]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
But I want more than a touch I want you to reach me[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
And show me all the things no one else can see[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
So what you feel becomes mine as well[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
And soon if we're lucky we'd be unable to tell[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
What's yours and mine, the fishing's fine[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
And it doesn't have to rhyme, so don't you feed me a line[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]
But you[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
Why you wanna give me a run-around?[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
Is it a sure-fire way to speed things up?[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
When all it does is slow me down[/tab]

[Instrumental]
[ch]G[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  x6

[Verse 5]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
Tra la la bom da dear, this is the pilot speaking, and I've[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
Got some news for you[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
It seems my ship still stands no matter what you drop[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
And there ain't a whole lot that you can do[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
Oh sure the banner may be torn and the wind's gotten colder[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
Perhaps I've grown a little cynical[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
But I know no matter what the waitress brings[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
I shall drink it and always be full, yeah[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
I will drink it and always be full[/tab]

[Verse 6]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
Oh I like coffee and I like tea[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
I'd like to be able to enter a final plea[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
I still got this dream that you just can't shake[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
I love you to the point you can no longer take[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
Well all right okay, so be that way[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]
I hope and pray that there's something left to say[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]
But you[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
Why you wanna give me a run-around?[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
Is it a sure-fire way to speed things up[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
When all it does is slow me down?[/tab]

[Outro]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]
Oh you[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
Why you wanna give me a run-around?[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
Is it a sure-fire way to speed things up[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
When all it does is slow me down?[/tab]
